name: weekly-review
description: Summarize last week's analytics, review open issues, and produce a status report.

steps.prompt: Read .guild/analytics/metrics-reports.jsonl and produce a per-agent token-usage summary for the last 7 days. Save the summary under .guild/runtime/weekly-review/analytics.md.
Use the gh CLI to list issues opened and closed in the last 7 days. Group by label. Save under .guild/runtime/weekly-review/issues.md.
Combine the analytics and issues reports into a single status report. Highlight regressions and any agent with token usage > 2x the median.
Show the status report. The user will edit it inline if needed before publishing.
Post the status report to the configured Slack channel.
